signals.title: Protect Children's Innocence Act
signals.summary: This bill aims to prohibit certain medical procedures related to gender transition for minors, criminalizing the provision of puberty blockers, cross-sex hormones, and gender-affirming surgeries to individuals under 18.
key_provisions: Prohibits medical professionals from performing gender-affirming procedures on minors.
Establishes penalties for violations, including fines and imprisonment.

signals.title: State-Level Legislation on Gender-Affirming Care
signals.summary: Several states have enacted laws either restricting or protecting access to gender-affirming care for minors, with variations in parental consent requirements.
key_provisions: Washington and California allow minors to access gender-affirming care without parental consent.
Other states restrict such care citing concerns over children's safety and well-being.

signals.title: INFORM Consumers Act Implementation
signals.summary: The FTC began enforcing the INFORM Consumers Act, requiring online marketplaces to verify the identity of high-volume third-party sellers to enhance transparency and consumer protection.
key_provisions: Online marketplaces must collect, verify, and disclose specific information about high-volume third-party sellers.
Consumers should have a clear mechanism to report suspicious activities.

signals.title: FTC's Rule on Unfair or Deceptive Fees
signals.summary: The FTC implemented a rule prohibiting bait-and-switch pricing and other deceptive practices related to fees in live-event ticketing and short-term lodging sectors.
key_provisions: Prohibits misrepresenting total prices and fees.
Requires clear disclosure of all fees upfront.

signals.title: Executive Order on Combating Cybercrime, Fraud, and Predatory Schemes Against American Citizens
signals.summary: This executive order mandates a comprehensive review to enhance tools against transnational criminal organizations involved in cyber-enabled crimes targeting vulnerable populations, including children.
key_provisions: Establishes a dedicated operational cell within the NCC.
Directs the Attorney General to prioritize prosecutions of cyber-enabled fraud and scam schemes.
